subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou beholdest these servants whose hearts have been sanctified from the stains of doubt and whose souls have been purified from defilement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی تری هولاء عباد تقدست قلوبهم عن شوائب الشبهات و تنزهت ارواحهم عن وضر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
